---
title: "Social Comparison Project"
author: Michele Garbelotto
date: today
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    toc: true    
    toc-location: left
    theme:
      light: minty
      dark: superhero
---

# Presentations

- [Literature review and experimental designs](SC_Presentation.html)

- [Losses and gains in social comparison](SC_LossAndGainHp.html)

- [3 slides: hp, experimental design and expected results](SC_3slides.html)
